The '''Dantooine Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The squadron was assigned to the Rebel headquarters on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] before the base was abandoned. Elements of the Dantooine Squadron, along with [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] from the [[Ecliptic Evaders]] and the [[Tierfon Yellow Aces/Legends|Tierfon Yellow Aces]], were cobbled together to form [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] for the assault on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], where they were greatly diminished.

Members of the group included [[Bren Quersey/Legends|Bren Quersey]], [[Theron Nett/Legends|Theron Nett]], and squadron leader [[Garven Dreis/Legends|Garven Dreis]]. All three pilots were killed during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] while flying in [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]].<ref name="TEGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
